use_cases: Dark-themed hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Atmospheric backdrops for SaaS product showcases
Premium/elegant visual atmosphere for marketing sites
ai_summary: A dark atmospheric gradient background component featuring a radial gradient that transitions from pure black at the horizon point to deep navy blue (#0d1a36), creating a sophisticated horizon glow effect. Designed as a foundational layer for dark-themed hero sections and landing pages, this minimalist atomic component provides visual depth without UI elements.
